=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/unnecessaryFailYieldableError.ts(13,59): suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'SchemaError' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
/.src/unnecessaryFailYieldableError.ts(21,3): suggestion TS377019: This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`. effect(unnecessaryFailYieldableError)
/.src/unnecessaryFailYieldableError.ts(22,3): suggestion TS377019: This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`. effect(unnecessaryFailYieldableError)


==== /.src/unnecessaryFailYieldableError.ts (3 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    /** @effect-diagnostics missingReturnYieldStar:skip-file */
    import * as Data from "effect/Data"
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
    
    class NonYieldable extends Error {
      readonly _tag = "NonYieldable"
    }
    
    class DataTaggedError extends Data.TaggedError("DataTaggedError")<{}> {}
    
    class SchemaError extends Schema.TaggedError<SchemaError>("SchemaError")("SchemaError", {}) {}
                                                              ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377045: Identifier 'SchemaError' is redundant since it equals the _tag value. effect(redundantSchemaTagIdentifier)
    
    export const unnecessaryFailYieldableError = Effect.gen(function*() {
      // should not report
      yield* Effect.fail(new NonYieldable("non-yieldable error"))
      const err = new DataTaggedError()
      console.log(err)
      // should report
      yield* Effect.fail(new DataTaggedError())
      ~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377019: This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`. effect(unnecessaryFailYieldableError)
      yield* Effect.fail(new SchemaError("schema error"))
      ~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377019: This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`. effect(unnecessaryFailYieldableError)
    })
    
    // should not report
    export const shouldNotReport = Effect.fail(new DataTaggedError())
